name: UIStatusEffect-en
ddl: CREATE TABLE "UIStatusEffect-en" (Key INTEGER, "DLCFlags" INTEGER, "Comment" TEXT, "Type" INTEGER, "Name" TEXT, "Caption" TEXT, "Unknown14" INTEGER, "Unknown18" INTEGER, "Unknown1C" INTEGER, "Unknown20" INTEGER, "Unknown22" INTEGER);
rows: MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED Crystal

The unit's HP has fallen to zero, and it is unable to fight.

Removed with the item <color=151>phoenix down</color>, or the White Magicks <color=151>Raise</color> or <color=151>Arise</color>.

The unit has turned into a living corpse. Attempts to restore its HP will cause damage instead of heal. If the unit is KO'd in this state, it cannot be revived via normal methods.

Removed with the item <color=151>holy water</color>.

The unit has turned to solid stone. Its CT Gauge does not fill up, and its turn will not come. It cannot be targeted by the enemy while in this state.

Removed with the items <color=151>gold needle</color> or <color=151>remedy</color>, or the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit has changed sides to fight for Ramza. It will remain an ally for the duration of the battle, at the conclusion of which it can be recruited as a permanent party member.

This status cannot be removed.

Darkness clouds the unit's sight, rendering its attacks easier to avoid.

Removed with the Fundaments ability <color=151>Salve</color>, the items <color=151>eye drops</color> or <color=151>remedy</color>, or the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit is disoriented, unable to tell friend from foe, and attacks either indiscriminately on its turn. It cannot evade physical or magickal attacks, or perform certain reaction abilities.

Removed with the item <color=151>remedy</color>, the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>, or by inflicting damage to the unit's HP.

The unit has lost the ability to vocalize incantations. It cannot use certain action abilities or perform the reaction ability Magick Counter.

Removed with the Fundaments ability <color=151>Salve</color>, the items <color=151>echo herbs</color> or <color=151>remedy</color>, or the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit wanders in search of blood. It cannot be given orders on its turn, and uses the Blood Drain ability to drink the blood of friend and foe alike, inflicting them with the Vampire status. In addition, most reaction abilities will not trigger for those with Vampire status.

Removed with the item <color=151>holy water</color>.
[MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED] Chest

The unit is coated in a film of oil, rendering it highly flammable. It sustains increased damage from fire-element attacks.

Removed with the item <color=151>remedy</color>, or when damage is sustained from a fire-element attack.

The unit floats above the ground. It receives a +1 bonus to height over both land and water, and can move unhindered by terrain that normally impedes movement. Also, the unit will take no damage from earth-elemental attacks, and it will not be poisoned if it comes to a stop on a poisonous fen tile.

Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The unit is protected from being KO'd. If struck down, it will be resurrected when its next turn comes.

Removed when the unit is resurrected, or with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The unit has disappeared from sight and cannot be targeted by the enemy. In this state, the unit's attacks ignore its target's physical and magickal evasion, meaning they are guaranteed to hit.

Removed if the unit performs an ability on its turn, or by the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The unit has been consumed by rage. While its physical attack is increased, it cannot be given orders on its turn, and only uses the Attack command. It is also unable to perform most reaction abilities.

Removed with the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit has been overcome with fear. It cannot be given orders on its turn, and will flee from the enemy until its bravery is 10 or above. It sustains increased damage, and cannot perform most reaction abilities.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Speechcraft ability <color=151>Praise</color>.

The unit has turned into a toad. It can only use Attack or the Black Magic ability Toad, and its physical strength is greatly reduced. It sustains increased physical damage, and cannot perform most reaction abilities.

Removed with the items <color=151>maiden's kiss</color> or <color=151>remedy</color>, the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>, or the Black Magick <color=151>Toad</color>.
[MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED] Critical

[DESCRIPTION MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED] The unit is severely wounded, with its HP reduced to 20% of its maximum value.

Removed by restoring HP.

Poison courses through the unit's body. It will sustain a small amount of damage at the end of its turn.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Fundaments ability <color=151>Salve</color>, the items <color=151>antidote</color> or <color=151>remedy</color>, or the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit's health is gradually recovering. It regains a small amount of HP at the end of its turn.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The unit enjoys heightened resistance to physical attacks. It sustains reduced damage from attacks, and lowers the success rate of certain abilities used on it.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The unit enjoys heightened resistance to magickal attacks. It sustains reduced damage from attacks, and lowers the success rate of certain abilities used on it.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The flow of time has sped up for the unit. Its CT Gauge fills more quickly, and its turn comes sooner.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The flow of time has slowed for the unit. Its CT Gauge fills more slowly, and its turn comes later.

Wears off with time.

The flow of time has stopped for the unit. Its CT Gauge does not fill, and its turn will not come. It cannot parry physical or magickal attacks, or perform reaction abilities.

Wears off with time. Removed with the chocobo ability <color=151>Choco Esuna</color>.

The unit has become preternaturally devout. Its faith is treated as being 100 regardless of its actual value.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The unit has lost all belief in a higher power. Its faith is treated as being zero regardless of its actual value.

Wears off with time.

The unit is spellbound and has joined the enemy ranks. It cannot be given orders on its turn, and performs actions that disadvantage its former allies.

Removed by inflicting damage to the unit's HP.

The unit has fallen into a deep sleep. Its CT Gauge does not fill, and its next turn will not come. It cannot parry physical or magickal attacks, or perform certain reaction abilities. It also sustains increased damage.

Removed with the item <color=151>remedy</color> or the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit is rooted to the spot, and cannot move on its turn.

Wears off with time. Removed with the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

The unit is unable to perform action abilities, and various other abilities cannot be used. It also cannot evade or parry physical or magickal attacks.

Wears off with time. Removed with the White Magick <color=151>Esuna</color>.

A refractive barrier envelops the unit. Spells cast upon it are redirected a distance away, including healing and enhancement magicks.

Wears off with time. Removed with the Mystic Arts ability <color=151>Harmony</color>.

The moment of the unit's death draws near. The number over its head counts down on its turn; when the number reaches zero, the unit is KO'd.

Removed when KO'd.
[MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED] <color=151>Removes:</color> Blind, Silence, Oil, Toad, Posion, Slow, Stop, Immobilize, Disable
[MARKED FOR DELETION - REPORT IF DISPLAYED]<color=151>Removes:</color> Doom
